name: BlueCat Address Manager
description: BlueCat Address Manager RESTful v2 API for DNS zone management, resource record operations, IP address management, and network block administration

auth_config.note: Token obtained via /api/v2/sessions endpoint using basic auth credentials

actions.name: Authenticate
actions.description: Create a session and obtain an API token for subsequent requests

actions.name: List DNS Zones
actions.description: Retrieve all DNS zones managed by BlueCat Address Manager

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of zones to return

actions.name: List Resource Records
actions.description: Retrieve all DNS resource records in a specific zone

parameters.name: zone_id
parameters.description: ID of the DNS zone to query records from

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression for record types or names

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

actions.name: Create Resource Record
actions.description: Create a new DNS resource record (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.)

parameters.name: zone_id
parameters.description: ID of the DNS zone to create the record in

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Resource record definition including name, type, rdata (record data), and TTL

actions.name: Delete Resource Record
actions.description: Delete an existing DNS resource record by ID

parameters.name: record_id
parameters.description: ID of the resource record to delete

actions.name: List IP Blocks
actions.description: Retrieve all IP address blocks in the Address Manager

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of blocks to return

actions.name: List IP Networks
actions.description: Retrieve all IP networks (subnets) within a block

parameters.name: block_id
parameters.description: ID of the IP block to list networks from

actions.name: Get IP Address Info
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific IP address including associated records and metadata

parameters.name: address_id
parameters.description: ID of the IP address to look up

actions.name: Deploy Changes
actions.description: Deploy pending DNS and DHCP changes to managed servers

parameters.name: server_id
parameters.description: ID of the server to deploy changes to
